telos: Determine whether the convergence demo is ready for future prototype work by discovering the documentation, skills, connectors, tests, and model roles needed before any build begins.
connectors_needed: Context7 only when a concrete SDK or API change is proposed
missing_capabilities: live external LLM calls depend on provider credentials, but deterministic paths do not
recommendation_to_claude: Prototype safely against deterministic tests first; treat provider-backed chat as an optional integration slice.
